creator: pesho.petrov@gmail.com
text:
The patch updates audio/libmtp to version 0.3.1. Because of interface changes, this update breaks audio/amarok and audio/gnomad2.
I expect audio/amarok to be updated soon, but audio/gnomad2 will problably update much later (newest version 2.9.1 doesn't compile with libmtp v0.3.1).
